title: Expand multilingual and hidden-risk request coverage
outOfScope: Release publication and execution-plan cleanup reserved for Work Items 7 and 8.

sources.reason: Review identifies English keyword dependence and weak Chinese/multilingual hidden-risk coverage.
Current explicit unsupported-operation vocabulary is narrow.

riskAssessment.reason: Bounded phrase coverage expansion with explicit residual limits.

preReviewWarnings: Review multilingual explicit boundary phrases and residual hidden-risk limits.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: English, Chinese, and Japanese explicit unsupported-operation phrases are blocked.
Hidden-risk phrasing is covered by deterministic fail-closed regression tests.
Documentation states the vocabulary is coverage, not semantic completeness.
guidelines: Do not claim complete multilingual understanding.

intent.problem: English-only explicit boundary terms leave Chinese, Japanese, and hidden-risk paraphrases under-covered.
constraints: Keep matching deterministic and fail closed.
intent.rationale: A small tested multilingual vocabulary improves known-risk coverage while preserving the documented boundary that language understanding is incomplete.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Chinese and Japanese unsupported operation phrases are blocked.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized automatic serial execution, PR merge, and branch cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
